queries.question: Show me all passengers with cabin baggage and passengers with checked baggage which cost $25.
queries.sql:
SELECT Passengers.FullName
FROM Luggage JOIN Passengers ON Passengers.PassengerID = Luggage.PassengerID
WHERE (Luggage.Description = "Cabin Baggage" OR Luggage.Description = "Checked Baggage") AND Luggage.Fees = "$25"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?luggage a :Luggage .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?luggage p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?fullname .
  ?luggage p:Description ?description_w .
  ?luggage p:Description ?description_w2 .
  ?luggage p:Fees ?fees_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?description_w) = "Cabin Baggage" || STR(?description_w2) = "Checked Baggage")) && STR(?fees_w) = "$25"))
}

queries.sql:

FROM Luggage JOIN Passengers ON Passengers.PassengerID = Luggage.PassengerID
WHERE Luggage.Description = "Cabin Baggage" OR Luggage.Description = "Checked Baggage" AND Luggage.Fees = "$25"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?luggage a :Luggage .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?luggage p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?fullname .
  ?luggage p:Description ?description_w .

  ?luggage p:Fees ?fees_w .
  FILTER((STR(?description_w) = "Cabin Baggage" || (STR(?description_w2) = "Checked Baggage" && STR(?fees_w) = "$25")))
}
